title: Eachanari Vinayagar Temple
tagline: Eachanari Vinayagar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Eachanari Vinayagar Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vinayagar, situated in the village Eachanari near Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Eachanari Vinayagar Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vinayagar, situated in the village Eachanari near Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is situated about 12 km from the city of Coimbatore on NH 209.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Eachanari
topPlaces.description: Eachanari is a suburb of Coimbatore city in Tamil Nadu, India. The suburb and its environs are also home to the Eachanari Vinayagar Temple.

topPlaces.name: Seerappalayam
topPlaces.description: Seerappalayam is a village in Coimbatore district of Tamil Nadu state in India. As of the 2011 Census of India, it had a population of 5,881 across 1,646 households.

topPlaces.name: Malumichampatti
topPlaces.description: Malumichampatti (also known as Malumachampatti) is a residential village in the Coimbatore-South taluk, Coimbatore district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is along the National Highway 209.

topPlaces.name: Kurumbapalayam (Madukkarai)
topPlaces.description: Kurumbapalayam (Madukkarai), is a locality in the Coimbatore district of Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is a sub-locality of Madukkarai municipality, and it lies on the southern outskirts of Coimbatore city.

topPlaces.name: Othakalmandapam
topPlaces.description: Othakkalmandapam is a panchayat town in Madukkarai taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the north-western part of the state, it is one of the 33 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Madukkarai Block
topPlaces.description: Madukkarai block is a revenue block of Coimbatore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 9 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Madukkarai taluk
topPlaces.description: Madukkarai taluk is a taluk in Coimbatore district, Tamil Nadu, India. It was created by Government of Tamil Nadu in 2013.

topPlaces.name: Madukkarai
topPlaces.description: Madukkarai is a municipality in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the headquarters of Madukkarai taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Eachanari Vinayagar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Eachanari Vinayagar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Eachanari Vinayagar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (14 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (10 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Eachanari Vinayagar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Eachanari Vinayagar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Eachanari Vinayagar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Eachanari Vinayagar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Eachanari Vinayagar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Eachanari, Seerappalayam, Malumichampatti, Kurumbapalayam (Madukkarai), Othakalmandapam.
